channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Over 30,000 Kaiser Permanente health care workers to end strike in California, Hawaii
item.description: An estimated 31,000 registered nurses and other front-line Kaiser Permanente health care workers will return to work on Tuesday after a four-week stri...

item.title: US futures slip, world markets are mixed after the Supreme Court nixes Trump's tariffs
item.description: U.S. futures were broadly lower on Monday as uncertainty lingered after the Supreme Court struck down most of President Donald Trump’s sweeping tariff...

item.title: Fed's Waller says rate cut in March is a 'coin flip' following a strong US jobs report
item.description: Federal Reserve governor Christopher Waller said Monday that solid job gains in January could mean the central bank can skip a rate cut at its next me...

item.title: Supreme Court agrees to hear from oil, gas companies trying to block climate lawsuits
item.description: The Supreme Court has agreed to hear from oil and gas companies trying to block lawsuits seeking to hold the industry liable for billions of dollars i...

item.title: Rubio goes to Caribbean to assert US interests after Venezuela strikes, Iran threats
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is traveling to the Caribbean country of St. Kitts and Nevis this week to reassert the Trump administration’s interests...
